headline: Trump says the Iran war is over, Spirit Airlines prepares to shut down, and a horse racing star wants a derby victory. Read more in today’s What’s News newsletter:
Trump’s new Air Force One will arrive this summer, combining all the Qatari royal opulence with a $400 million security overhaul
Despite Iowa’s history of voting Republican, nonpartisan analysts rate the state’s race for governor and two of its four U.S. House contests as tossups that either party could win in November

The Minneapolis Fed president wrote that heightened inflation risks from the Iran war led him to object to the Fed’s policy statement this week that implied the central bank’s next move is likely to be a rate cut
Rep. Max Miller’s lawyers admit he lied about witness in domestic violence case against ex-wife
Thousands rally in L.A. for May Day to protest immigration sweeps, high cost of living
Chirayu Rana — former JPMorgan banker at center of ‘completely fabricated’ ‘sex slave’ allegations against Lorna Hajdini — left new job 3 weeks ago
Missing Oscar found after Academy Award winner blocked from taking it on flight
US imposes sanctions on three Iranian currency exchanges — accusing them of laundering billions
Trump announces tariffs on European cars going to 25% next week — claims bloc ‘not complying’ with trade deal
